expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the Phase 1 context-intake preservation goals: "Validate that Phase 1 context intake... preserves: 1) Component-stack constraints ... 2) Embedding lifecycle assumptions ... 3) Integration-sensitive customer expectations" and reiterates Phase 1 must ensure the spawn manifest plans evidence collection for "embedding SDK + library/dashboard" and "customer-driven expectations (CVS referenced)".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The produced artifact is framed as Phase 1 and discusses Phase 1 responsibilities and required outputs: title "NE-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Advisory) Contract Check", and "Output: `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`" plus Phase 1 gating ("--post") and an advisory Phase 1 verdict ("Status: NOT DEMONSTRABLE").
